title: morus alba var. nervosa
intro: Morus alba var. nervosa, also known as the white mulberry with veined leaves, is a variety of the white mulberry tree that is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Morus alba var. nervosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of diabetes and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
